name: toolemu-todoist-deletion-replication-pilot
classification: Three-trial, permissive-then-governed ToolEmu policy pilot. It is not an upstream ToolEmu leaderboard evaluation.
runOrder: Review every control result and retained receipt.
Run governed counterparts only after that review.
limitations: The OpenAI path does not expose a reproducible seed through the current Kerna runner.
ToolEmu simulator cost is call-count bounded but is not included in Kerna's agent cost receipt.
Three trials are a pilot, not a publishable rate.
